name: Autodesk Acquires Innovyze
description: Autodesk completed its $1 billion acquisition of Innovyze, positioning itself as a leading provider of end-to-end digital solutions for water infrastructure. The deal was first announced February 24, 2021, bringing ~3,000 utility customers and 35 years of water modeling expertise into the Autodesk portfolio.

name: GitHub Copilot Preview
description: GitHub announced Copilot technical preview powered by OpenAI Codex — the first mainstream AI coding assistant, working especially well for Python, JavaScript, Ruby, and Go.

name: Copilot for Visual Studio
description: Copilot became available in VS 2022. Clone activity spiked to 483 in March — 10x the typical monthly rate.

name: GitHub Copilot GA
description: Copilot became generally available as a subscription. By this time, it was behind 27% of developers' code across all languages.

name: ChatGPT Launches
description: OpenAI released ChatGPT publicly. Fastest-growing consumer app in history — 100M users in two months. Repo traffic rose ~60% within 2 months.

name: GPT-4 Released
description: OpenAI launched GPT-4 with significantly improved reasoning and coding. The ChatGPT API also opened for developers, enabling programmatic integration.

name: Code Interpreter + Claude 2
teaser: Upload data, run Python in chat
description: OpenAI launched Code Interpreter for ChatGPT Plus — upload files and run Python analysis in a sandboxed environment. Anthropic released Claude 2 five days later. Views jumped from 1,773 to 3,657 in one month.

name: ICM 2024.4 + 2024.5
description: Autodesk released InfoWorks ICM 2024.4 and 2024.5 with new shortcut keys, significantly faster result retrieval from remote servers, improved SWMM model compatibility, and a new cloud results download dialog.

name: Claude 3 Family
description: Anthropic launched the Claude 3 model family with significantly better coding capabilities. Views surged to 8,965 in April — up 51% from March.

name: ICM 2025 Releases
description: Autodesk announced 2025 releases for hydraulic modeling with FEH22 rainfall support, Civil 3D integration for sewer networks, and cloud simulation.

name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet
description: Anthropic released Claude 3.5 Sonnet with enhanced speed and accuracy, quickly becoming the preferred model for many AI coding workflows.

name: OpenAI o1 Reasoning
description: OpenAI released o1-preview, a new class of reasoning model that “thinks” before responding. Scored 83% on math olympiad problems vs GPT-4o’s 13%, and reached 89th percentile in coding competitions.

name: Windsurf IDE Launches
description: Codeium launched Windsurf, positioning it as the first agentic IDE. Alongside Cursor, it signaled a shift toward AI-native development environments that go beyond code completion to full task autonomy.

name: Claude Code + 3.7 Sonnet
description: Anthropic launched Claude 3.7 Sonnet with hybrid reasoning and Claude Code — the first agentic coding CLI tool for delegating engineering tasks directly from the terminal.

name: Copilot Coding Agent
description: GitHub launched the Copilot coding agent in public preview — an autonomous agent that can be assigned issues, implement changes, run tests, and open pull requests, all in a secure cloud environment.

name: Copilot Agent GA
description: GitHub Copilot coding agent reached general availability for all paid subscribers. Excels at low-to-medium complexity tasks in well-tested codebases with clear issue descriptions.

name: Autodesk: Ruby + AI Agents
teaser: AI makes scripting accessible to all
description: Autodesk published a blog post encouraging hydraulic modelers to use Claude and Cursor to generate Ruby scripts for InfoWorks ICM — democratizing automation for engineers without programming backgrounds.
